high_consensus.description: Rollback/failure recovery plan per sprint — compensating actions, feature flags, safe-disable paths
Task sizing (S/M/L) and critical path identification for 54-task solo plan
Settlement threat model section — key compromise, replay, front-running, chain-binding, nonce semantics, monitoring
Redis outage degradation mode — default routing, disable exploration, conservative scoring
Shadow mode graduation criteria — time window, divergence thresholds, required green metrics, approval step

blockers.concern: Solo team + 54 tasks across 6 sprints is throughput mismatch
blockers.decision: override (known constraint, mitigated by IMP-002 task sizing + critical path)

blockers.concern: S3 Object Lock COMPLIANCE mode is irreversible — misconfiguration bricks bucket
blockers.decision: override (risk register: GOVERNANCE first, COMPLIANCE only production)

blockers.concern: Kill switch env var split-brain across ECS tasks during rollout
blockers.decision: override (acceptable transient state, rolling update minutes, both modes valid)

blockers.concern: EMA event ordering/idempotency assumptions may not hold in distributed systems
blockers.decision: override (addressed in SDD v1.2.0: Lua rejection + lastEventHash)
